events.description: LCC accepted the recommendation to not use the new KLISS system
Stop Work Order delivered to Propylon

evidence.quote: The LCC further instructed the KLISS Modernization Steering Committee (Steering Committee) to re-evaluate the options available for the KLISS Modernization
evidence.note: LCC's instruction to the Steering Committee

evidence.quote: This Stop Work Order will be in effect until November 30, 2025.
evidence.note: Duration of the Stop Work Order

uncertainties: What will be the outcome of the Steering Committee's re-evaluation of options for the KLISS Modernization Project?
recommended_next_queries: What are the specific options being considered by the Steering Committee?
What is the expected timeline for the Steering Committee's recommendation to the LCC?
